svg.title: Operations Agent — Plan-Execute-Replan Pattern
svg.desc: A flowchart showing how an Operations Agent uses a Plan-Execute-Replan loop with a Planner Agent, Executor Agent, tool set, Replanner Agent, and an evaluation decision diamond that either exits or continues the loop.
svg.text: This is a loop — exits only when evaluation passes
[step 3] call send_msg to post summary to group
